rule_id: Python: Sorted should not be wrapped directly inside set
title: Sorted should not be wrapped directly inside set
description: Creating a sorted list using a set is generally slower and less memory-efficient. It is recommended to use list and sort() instead.

noncompliant.description: Creating a sorted set using a list.

compliant.description: Creating an unsorted set using a list.

why_is_this_an_issue: Creating a sorted list using a set is generally slower and less memory-efficient.

metadata.rule_id: Python: Sorted should not be wrapped directly inside set
metadata.title: Sorted should not be wrapped directly inside set
